# CWE-488 positive: global map keyed by client session id (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-488-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

var cartsBySession = map[string][]string{}

func ViewCart(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sid := r.URL.Query().Get("session")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]any{"items": cartsBySession[sid]})
}

func AddCartItem(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	sid := r.URL.Query().Get("session")
	cartsBySession[sid] = append(cartsBySession[sid], r.FormValue("sku"))
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
